name: Aelindra Swiftarrow
notes: Example level-1 Wizard derived from the built-in stat block.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: You have learned to cast spells using INT. Prepared spells = INT mod + Wizard level.

level1Features.name: Arcane Recovery
level1Features.description: Once per day on a short rest, recover spell slots totaling up to half your Wizard level (round up). Slots can be of 5th level or lower.

level1Features.name: Ritual Casting
level1Features.description: You can cast Wizard spells with the ritual tag as rituals.

level1Features.name: Evocation Savant
level1Features.description: The gold and time you must spend to copy an Evocation spell into your spellbook is halved.

level1Features.name: Sculpt Spells
level1Features.description: You can create pockets of relative safety within the effects of your Evocation spells.

allFeatures.name: Spellcasting
allFeatures.description: You have learned to cast spells using INT. Prepared spells = INT mod + Wizard level.

allFeatures.name: Arcane Recovery
allFeatures.description: Once per day on a short rest, recover spell slots totaling up to half your Wizard level (round up). Slots can be of 5th level or lower.

allFeatures.name: Ritual Casting
allFeatures.description: You can cast Wizard spells with the ritual tag as rituals.

allFeatures.name: Evocation Savant
allFeatures.description: The gold and time you must spend to copy an Evocation spell into your spellbook is halved.

allFeatures.name: Sculpt Spells
allFeatures.description: You can create pockets of relative safety within the effects of your Evocation spells.

allFeatures.name: Fey Ancestry
allFeatures.description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed; can't be magically put to sleep.

allFeatures.name: Cantrip (Minor Illusion)
allFeatures.description: High Elf bonus cantrip: Minor Illusion (INT-based).

allFeatures.name: Researcher
allFeatures.description: When you attempt to learn or recall a piece of lore, if you do not know that information, you often know where and from whom you can obtain it.

backgroundFeature: Researcher: When you attempt to learn or recall a piece of lore, if you do not know that information, you often know where and from whom you can obtain it.
